Top of Mind (Plug & Play)
Things to keep in mind:
You always want to maintain several touchpoints with prospective clients. We do
this through cheap retargeting ads on Facebook as well as emailing our leads
weekly.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Emailing Your Leads
1. Create a Mailchimp account or if you already have an email CRM, you can
continue to use that
2. Once you have 100 leads in your Pipedrive, export them all and put them in a
list on your CRM titled ‘Agency leads’. Also do this every time right before you
start writing the week’s email.
3. I recommend you pencil in one work block same time every Monday to think
of an idea, write it up, and send it out to your leads.
4. Make this a weekly ritual, go back over the module on how to create copy and
study it thoroughly. Soon enough - you’ll notice the quality of both your emails
and ad copy skyrocket.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Re-Targeting With FaBo Ads
1. Create your ad copy and choose a compelling image. Photos of you will
convert a lot higher. You can also test using your emails as pieces of ad copy
too!
2. Build an audience on Facebook of all website visitors. If you have a strong
Instagram that’s business based, you can also build an audience of people
who visited your profile in the last 30 days. Whatever audience you use (or
both) needs to be at least 500 in size or the advert wont start running.
3. Bring it all together with what you’ve learned in previous ad training. You
want to use all placements as it’s re-targeting and use the budget calculator
for re-targeting to decide how much to spend. If your audience size is only
500, then just use $1 a day budget.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
